name: todo-app
description: Full-stack TODO app: NestJS + Prisma + SQLite backend, Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui (Base UI) frontend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter backend start:dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
